text.title: GraphQL API Design Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Need: dashboard with org/user/orders, web+mobile clients. → New GraphQL service. → Design SDL with Relay pagination on orders. → Add OrganizationLoader and OrdersByUserLoader, per-request in context. → permission_classes=[IsOrgMember] on every org-scoped resolver. → QueryDepthLimiter(10) + QueryComplexityExtension(200).

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
